books.title: Those Barren Leaves
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: An aristocrat summons a group of “intelligentsia” to vacation in her Italian mansion.

books.title: The Laughing Cavalier
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: An ancestor of the Scarlet Pimpernel is recruited to kidnap a woman for a few days.

books.title: The Autobiography of Benjamin Franklin
books.author: Benjamin Franklin
books.summary: Benjamin Franklin writes about his youth, adventures, and achievements.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: Pollyanna
books.author: Eleanor H. Porter
books.summary: An orphan’s unrelenting optimism sees her through adversity and lifts up her new community.

books.title: Arms and the Man
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: A humorous examination of human hypocrisy and war’s stupidity in the midst of the Serbo-Bulgarian war.

books.title: The Libation Bearers
books.author: Aeschylus
books.summary: A man is ordered by a god to avenge his father’s murder by killing his mother and her lover.

books.title: Sylvie and Bruno
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.summary: Two siblings alternate between fantasy and the real world after their father is the victim of a political conspiracy.

books.title: The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: The adventures of a young boy and his friend, an escaped slave, on the Mississippi river in the Antebellum South.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Arthur Machen
books.summary: A collection of nine short fiction works by influential supernatural and horror author Arthur Machen.

books.title: Scrambles Amongst the Alps in the Years 1860–69
books.author: Edward Whymper
books.summary: A classic in early mountaineering literature, describing the first ascent of the Matterhorn and other climbs in the Alps.

books.title: The Circular Staircase
books.author: Mary Roberts Rinehart
books.summary: A middle-aged spinster rents a country home for the summer and finds herself in the middle of a murder mystery.

books.title: A Yankee in the Trenches
books.author: Robert Derby Holmes
books.summary: An American describes his experiences in the British Army in the First World War.

books.title: An Enquiry Concerning Human Understanding
books.author: David Hume
books.summary: Hume examines the fundamental nature of knowledge, reality and human understanding.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: James McIntyre
books.summary: A collection of poetry by James McIntyre.

books.title: The Coming of Bill
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A domineering author of books on eugenics and hygiene makes a match between her niece and an idle artist, intending them to raise a son according to her principles, regardless of the consequences.

books.title: Key Out of Time
books.author: Andre Norton
books.summary: While searching a distant world of shallow seas and archipelagos for traces of a galactic civilization, a group of explorers get stranded in the past and face a dangerous enemy.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Akutagawa Ryūnosuke
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Akutagawa Ryūnosuke, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Everlasting Man
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: G. K. Chesterton takes us through the history of man, rebuking common secular views and presenting the case for the Catholic Church.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Henry David Thoreau
books.summary: A collection of Henry David Thoreau’s essays.
